w1_pre_flagged_findings: Dynamic workflows (Anthropic 2026-05-28) reemplaza orquestación manual de poneglyph (DAG, paralelismo, gates)
github/spec-kit (107k stars) es comparable más directo del /flow workflow — verificar para US5/US6
Taxonomía canónica 2026: skills vs subagents vs workflows — reframe necesario en US5

gate_2_3_decisions.post_spec_addition_2026-05-29: dynamic workflows blog (Anthropic 2026-05-28) + Opus 4.8 added to corpus US2 as obligatory sources
gate_2_3_decisions.reframe_direction: COMBINAR poneglyph + dynamic workflows (NO reemplazo, NO tirar trabajo). Audit busca: qué se complementa, qué solapa, qué de poneglyph aporta valor sobre dynamic workflows built-in (Commandments, output-style, drillme, living-spec loop, etc.)

us2_residual_closure: US2 frontmatter quedo draft (agent no cerro); cerrado residualmente en Phase 5. Reincidencia del status-closure gap (feedback_status_close_verification.md)
review_adjustments_applied: Rules 9->8 (off-rubric), Critic 5->3 detail consistency, mean 7.64->7.57, report word count 2356->2699
phase4_significance: 1a ejecucion formal de /critic en la historia del sistema — mitigacion meta-circular funciono (cambio resultado, no rubber-stamp)
us6_recovery_note: US6 builder agent killed por heredoc bug; Lead completó findings.md directo (markdown, no heredoc). US7 report.md también Lead-direct.

scoring_summary.critical_negative_finding: Phase 4 Critic nunca ejecutada formalmente — review.md = 0 archivos; quality gate teorico (n=1 dogfooding sin proceso completo)

notes.atypical_feature: Research/audit feature — deliverable is a markdown report with category scoring, NOT code. Phase 2.5 = validations.md (no tests.md). Phase 3 build = research + synthesis + scoring. Phase 4 critic reviews report quality. Meta-circular bias: auditing /flow using /flow — Phase 4 MUST delegate to reviewer agent (Opus) for independent audit.
advisor_checklist_for_spec: Corpus de comparación cerrado (lista URLs/repos, 8-12 max)
Inventario checklist exhaustivo (19 skills + 4 commands + 3 agents + 4 hooks + 4 rules + 1 output-style + templates + state.json + frontmatter conventions)
Declaración: deliverable = markdown report, no código
AC sobre report quality (no sobre tests pasando)
Mención explícita sesgo meta-circular + mitigación (reviewer Opus en Phase 4)
Out-of-scope: implementar mejoras detectadas (eso sería /flow siguiente)
